---
title: "EPUB e-books — a chapter that opens in Apple Books"
description: "Quarto compiles a reflowable EPUB with a cover, styles and chapters that open natively on Mac, iPad and iPhone."
image: thumbnail.svg
image-alt: "EPUB e-books — a chapter that opens in Apple Books — Blood Doctor · Quarto"
date: "2026-07-12"
categories: [Documents]
engine: markdown
---

Seeing a chapter I had written, coded and published *myself* appear in **Apple
Books** was a genuinely remarkable moment. Quarto builds the EPUB directly.

## From Markdown to a real e-book

````yaml
---
title: "HbS trait vs β-thalassaemia trait"
author: "Dr Abdul Mannan"
format:
  epub:
    cover-image: cover.png
    css: epub-styles.css
    toc: true
---
````

````bash
quarto render explainer.qmd --to epub
````

The result is a reflowable **EPUB** — a proper cover, styled typography, a linked
table of contents and chapters — that opens in Apple Books, Calibre or any reader,
and resizes to any screen. A single explainer becomes a distributable e-book.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Download the e-book
Grab the [**HbS vs β-thal EPUB**](/outputs/epub-hbs-hba2/hbs-vs-beta-thal-hba2.epub)
and open it in Apple Books. Source and cover live in `outputs/epub-hbs-hba2/`.
:::
